facade_description: Two-storey brick facade with a flat roof and parapet, approximately 5.2 m wide. A commercial storefront occupies the ground floor with two double-hung sash windows above at the second floor. The building combines a pre-1889 residential structure with an early-twentieth-century (1914-1930) commercial addition. Multiple active businesses operate at this address, including Daan Go Cake Lab and Rollin Rosie. The street presence is well-maintained. No direct photo observation is available; description is based on database and HCD records.
